## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Emily Gutzmer for the Client Operations Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Problem:** GrowthX's fragmented ops (Linear, Notion, HubSpot) forces reactive work, blocking strategic planning for its pivot from agency to SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**The Candidate:** Emily Gutzmer's experience at Airtable and Curated4U directly addresses this, having built foundational ops systems (ticketing, health scoring) from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**The Solution:** The role's immediate priority is consolidating tools into a single platform to enable proactive strategy and support the upcoming SaaS/PLG model.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [**The Fit:** Gutzmer's project examples show a strong grasp of both technical implementation (Zendesk) and the critical change management needed to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Fragmented Operations at GrowthX

  - [**Business Context:** GrowthX is pivoting from a marketing agency to a SaaS company with a services layer.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
      - [**Current State:** A 1-year-old agency using an internal AI platform for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Future State:** The platform will become an external SaaS product with a PLG model.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Operational Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
      - [**Tooling:** Fragmented across Linear (strategic projects), Notion (health scoring), and HubSpot (limited seats).](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Impact:** This forces reactive work, preventing strategic analysis of team efficiency, customer health, and forecasting.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [**Goal:** Consolidate tools into a single platform for unified visibility and proactive planning.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)

### The Solution: Emily Gutzmer's Experience

  - [**Background:** Moved from Customer Success (Airtable) to Operations, driven by an interest in the consultative, operational aspects of the work.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Project 1: Zendesk Launch (Curated4U)**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Problem:** No formal client request process.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Solution:** Launched Zendesk to create a structured ticketing system.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
          - [Designed workflows and routing logic.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
          - [Enabled new metrics: ticket resolution time, feedback categorization.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
          - [Managed change for both clients and internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [**Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
          - [**Leadership:** Inconsistent urgency from leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
          - [**Adoption:** Reaching 90-95% adoption was difficult, as some team members clung to old, offline methods.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Project 2: Standardized Onboarding (Curated4U)**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Problem:** Inconsistent onboarding processes across clients.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [**Solution:** Created a flexible, standardized framework.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
          - [Conducted 1-on-1s to understand team-specific pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
          - [Built a bare-bones structure to ensure core steps were centralized.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
          - [Designed for future growth (e.g., platform-specific automations in Asana).](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Project 3: Customer Health Score (Curated4U)**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Problem:** Inconsistent client data prevented comparative analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built a multi-pillar health score dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
      - [**Method:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
          - [Standardized client data collection.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
          - [**Pillars:** Relationship Strength, Channel Expansion, KPIs (e-commerce), and a draft Deliverable Score.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

### GrowthX's Operational Context

  - [**1-Year Vision:** Design a delivery org that serves the new SaaS/PLG model, integrates with a subscription community, and maps a complex client ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Operational Change Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Current State:** Fast-paced, memo-driven (Amazon-style) process.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Method:** Leadership owns OKRs; teams have autonomy to execute approved solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [**Pace:** Decisions on blockers are made in 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [Evaluate Emily Gutzmer's fit for the Client Operations Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [Determine next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/kwbYec39_E6RvAizV5y3cXThbWzfUEQk?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
